productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Speeder Yellow Flip Flops
description: When the heart desires utmost style and comfort, you shouldn't deprive it of such pleasure! These flip flops from the united colors of benetton offer a fantastic look coupled with unbelievable all-day comfort. If you want to look awesome and feel great, they are your best bet. Team them with jeans or shorts for a perfectly relaxed look. It was never easier to look spectacular, cool and so wow! Upper Rubber straps in thong style for durability and comfort Rubber toe separator for maximum comfort and durability Midsole Mildly cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Graphic print and branding on footbed Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Diamond shaped grooves all over the outsole for better traction on all surfaces shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash Do not store in direct sunlight
